name: daily-ai-insight-engine
description: AI舆情分析日报系统 - 从每日新闻信息中提取结构化洞察

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && yarn dev" "cd web && yarn dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && yarn build && cd ../web && yarn build
scripts.test: cd backend && yarn test && cd ../web && yarn test
scripts.lint: cd backend && yarn lint && cd ../web && yarn lint
scripts.clean: rm -rf backend/node_modules backend/dist web/node_modules web/dist node_modules
scripts.stop: lsof -ti:3000 -ti:5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo '所有服务已停止'
